## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy services and potential fit for Bizly's new brand launch.](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing execution (starting at $12K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Ron is launching a new brand (Bonfire) and needs help with content strategy, but is hesitant about cost](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in helping VC-backed companies transition from paid to organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Ron is interested but not ready to commit; will review materials and consider options](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Model

  - [Initial 6-8 week strategy sprint phase ($20K)](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [Deliverables: roadmap, AI-ready templates, content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Can be accelerated if needed](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Execution phase starts at $12K/month, can scale up to $25K for comprehensive services](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Typically works with companies at $1M+ annual run rate](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Focuses on building editorial authority before scaling programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Bizly's New Brand Launch (Bonfire)

  - [Aims to be more like Airbnb for venue bookings](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Ron wants to architect it correctly from the start (server-side rendered, SEO-optimized)](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Needs help with domain authority content and educational/informative pages](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Considering individual contractor vs. full agency engagement](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [GrowthX emphasizes building topical authority through editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Starts with strategy phase to define roadmap, personas, and content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows for scaling content production](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Monitors performance and adapts strategy based on data](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)

### Programmatic Content Considerations

  - [GrowthX can create programmatic landing pages (e.g., "best of" lists for venues)](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Cautions against scaling too quickly without domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Suggests starting with smaller experiments (15-20 pages) to validate approach](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Comprehensive strategy phase with detailed deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [AI-powered content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Experience transitioning companies from paid to organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Limitation of two client kickoffs per week (next availability in July)](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send Ron the strategy phase deck and additional materials](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Ron to review materials and consider engagement options](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to discuss further questions](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Ron may visit GrowthX's SF office for in-person discussion if interested](https://fathom.video/share/znxwjZscKf2syGdMdydRA3m78xR7zf4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
